problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI may resolve What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
